name: Spirit Herb Growth System
description: Biological growth stages for spirit herbs. Higher-grade herbs take dramatically longer to mature — a dao herb may take centuries. This makes finding a mature heaven-grade herb rare.

hiddenProperties.age: Years since germination — affects potency and value
hiddenProperties.qiSaturation: 0.0-1.0 — how much ambient Qi the herb has absorbed
hiddenProperties.mutation: Environmental influence (fire-aspected, water-aspected, wind-aspected, earth-aspected, lightning-aspected, blood-soaked, karmic-stained, void-touched, yin-saturated, yang-saturated) — ~20% chance, 80% no mutation
hiddenProperties.medicinalPotency: Derived from age + qiSaturation + purity + mutation — determines pill yield and effect strength
hiddenProperties.karmicResidue: If the herb grew in a karmically significant location (battlefield, graveyard, inheritance site) it may carry trace karmic impressions

realmScaledPerception.qi_condensation: Recognizes it as a spirit herb (name, basic property)
realmScaledPerception.core_formation: Sees qi saturation percentage and purity
realmScaledPerception.nascent_soul: Sees the full hidden properties (e.g. '300-year-old Blood Spirit Grass, 92% saturation, high purity, karmic residue detected')
realmScaledPerception.spirit_formation: Sees mutation type and medicinal potency projection
realmScaledPerception.void_refining: Sees karmic residue origin and inheritance connections
realmScaledPerception.ascendant_plus: Sees the herb's complete timeline and future growth projection
